hero.title: INTERNATIONAL A&D GLOBAL WORK
hero.subtitle: Turkey's leading international employment and investment consultancy platform. Skilled workforce, global opportunities.

panels.title: Explore Our Platform
panels.subtitle: Choose the right panel for your needs
panels.skilled_desc: Expert positions in tourism, construction and garden sectors. Certified and experienced candidates.
panels.regular_desc: Job opportunities in cleaning, security, warehouse and many more sectors. No experience required.
panels.investor_desc: Investment projects supported by HR guarantees. Global opportunities, transparent management.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: At A&D Global Work, we work to connect talented workers from around the world with the best job opportunities and to offer investors global projects with reliable human resources support.
mission.value1_desc: Transparency and honesty in every process.
mission.value2_desc: Active partnerships in 40+ countries with expert teams.
mission.value3_desc: Fast and effective solutions for your needs.

skilled.title: Skilled Workers Platform
skilled.sub: Expert positions in tourism, construction and garden.
skilled.pickSub: Click a sector to see sub-positions
skilled.noJobs: No listings in this category yet.
skilled.cta_sub: Post a job now, reach expert candidates.

regular.title: General Workers Platform
regular.sub: Thousands of opportunities in cleaning, security, warehouse and more.
regular.pickSub: Choose the sector you want to apply for
regular.noJobs: No listings in this category yet.
regular.cta_sub: Reach thousands of job seekers quickly.

investors.title: Investors Portal
investors.sub: Strategic investment projects at global scale with A&D Global Work guarantee.
investors.openProjectsSub: Projects supported by A&D Global Work human resources guarantee
investors.contactTitle: Get in Touch for Investment Opportunities
investors.contactSub: Our expert team provides personalized investment consulting.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.sub: Our expert team is happy to assist with your questions.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Your message has been received! We will get back to you as soon as possible.

post.title: Post a Job Listing
post.sub: Reach qualified candidates. Post your first listing for free.
post.success: ✅ Your listing has been received! Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
post.required_note: * required fields. Your listing will be published within 24 hours after review.

footer.brand_desc: Your reliable partner in international human resources.

pricing.title: Simple & Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay by bank transfer, your account will be activated within 24 hours. No hidden fees.
pricing.bank_note: Don't forget to write your name and selected plan in the transfer description.
pricing.step1_desc: Select the membership plan that suits you.
pricing.step2_desc: Send the plan amount to the specified IBAN.
pricing.step3_desc: Send us your payment receipt via WhatsApp.
pricing.step4_desc: Your membership will be activated within 24 hours.

payment.title: Activate Your Membership
payment.subtitle: Pay by bank transfer, activated within 24 hours.
payment.iban_note: Don't forget to write your name and "{plan}" in the transfer description.
payment.notify_desc: After paying to the IBAN, click the button below to send us your receipt via WhatsApp. The message will be pre-filled automatically.
payment.save_prompt: Have you paid? Save your request so our team can check it.
payment.saved_title: Your payment request has been saved.
payment.saved_desc: Our team will activate your account after verifying your payment.
